topPlaces.name: Sawai Madhopur
topPlaces.description: Sawai Madhopur (IAST: Savāī Mādhōpur, IPA: [səˈʋaːiː ˈmaːdʱoːpʊɾ]) is a city in the south-eastern part of the Indian state of Rajasthan. It serves as the administrative headquarter of the Sawai Madhopur district, and forms a part of the Bharatpur division.

topPlaces.name: Siege of Ranthambore (1568)
topPlaces.description: In the siege of Ranthambore, on 8 February 1568, Akbar led a massive Mughal Army of over 50,000 men and besieged Ranthambore Fort. Akbar had become emboldened after his victories at the Battle of Thanesar and the siege of Chittorgarh and only Ranthambore Fort remained unconquered.

topPlaces.name: Ranthambore Fort
topPlaces.description: Ranthambore Fort lies within the Ranthambore National Park, near the city of Sawai Madhopur in Sawai Madhopur district of Rajasthan, India. The park being the former hunting grounds of the Maharajas of Jaipur until the time of India's Independence.

items.note: Sawai Madhopur (IAST: Savāī Mādhōpur, IPA: [səˈʋaːiː ˈmaːdʱoːpʊɾ]) is a city in the south-eastern part of the Indian state of Rajasthan. It serves as the administrative headquarter of the Sawai Madhopur district, and forms a part of the Bharatpur division.

In the siege of Ranthambore, on 8 February 1568, Akbar led a massive Mughal Army of over 50,000 men and besieged Ranthambore Fort. Akbar had become emboldened after his victories at the Battle of Thanesar and the siege of Chittorgarh and only Ranthambore Fort remained unconquered.

Ranthambore Fort lies within the Ranthambore National Park, near the city of Sawai Madhopur in Sawai Madhopur district of Rajasthan, India. The park being the former hunting grounds of the Maharajas of Jaipur until the time of India's Independence.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chamatkarji Jain Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chamatkarji Jain Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chamatkarji Jain Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Kota Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chamatkarji Jain Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chamatkarji Jain Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chamatkarji Jain Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chamatkarji Jain Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chamatkarji Jain Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sawai Madhopur, Siege of Ranthambore (1568), Ranthambore Fort.
